candidate.completion: date me before my houseplants start charging rent.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please date me before my houseplants start charging rent.

evaluation.rationale: The line lands a clear comic pivot by turning loneliness into a mock domestic emergency. "Charging rent" is the exact engine of the joke and gives the sentence shape, though the reversal is more amusing than devastating and the truth it carries is recognizable rather than sharp.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
